# Starting out

I’ve had various ideas of starting TWOLD with a single scene involving James searching the dimensions for Adelle.

I’ve also had ideas of Nivana running across James in her dreams during the first part, but haven’t explored that direction much.

Recently I had the idea, what if I expanded that into a multi-scene mini-part?
